name: Mujde Doenyas - Can’t Help Falling in Love-piano
description: “Can’t Help Falling in Love” is recorded by ELVIS PRESLEY for the album “Blue Hawaii” (1961) It is still Elvis’ most popular “love song”. Written by:  George David Weiss Hugo Peretti Luigi Creatore Pianocover by: Francesco Parrino Digital Art by:   AliMurat Susuz
